hero.title: Let's discuss your next project.
hero.subtitle: Tell us what your plant needs. We will respond within 24 business hours with a clear technical proposal.

form.title: Request a proposal or technical inquiry
form.subtitle: Fill in the form. Fields marked with an asterisk are required.

message.label: Project description or requirements
message.placeholder: Tell us about the equipment, the type of intervention required, timelines, location, etc. The more context you provide, the better we can tailor our proposal.

form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our technical team will review your message and respond within 24 business hours.
form.errorMessage: Please try again or write to us directly at {email}.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.minMessage: Please briefly describe your needs (minimum 20 characters)

sidebar.title: Direct contact
sidebar.emergencyText: For unplanned shutdowns outside office hours, contact us via WhatsApp. Our team deploys internationally.

items.question: How quickly do you respond to an inquiry?
items.answer: Within 24 business hours. Inquiries that include complete technical information receive a proposal faster.

items.question: Do you operate outside Latin America?
items.answer: Yes. Our team has active experience in Europe and Africa and deploys internationally. The most efficient first step is to coordinate an initial technical call.

items.question: Do you handle plant emergencies?
items.answer: Yes. For unplanned shutdowns, we recommend reaching out directly via WhatsApp, where we also respond outside office hours.

items.question: Do you work with specific brands?
items.answer: We work with multiple OEMs and models. After a brief technical consultation we can confirm whether your equipment falls within our direct experience.

items.question: Do you conduct site visits before submitting a proposal?
items.answer: For complex projects, yes. We coordinate a technical diagnostic visit before presenting a formal proposal.
